---
title: Topic 4
---


## Week 9: Text Data

- [Lecture Slides](https://github.com/GV330/course_materials/blob/main/lectures/GV330_Lecture9_Text%20as%20Data%20Handout.pdf)
- [Seminar Repo](https://github.com/GV330/seminar9)
    
## Week 10: Audio, Image, and Video Data

- [Lecture Slides](https://github.com/GV330/course_materials/blob/main/lectures/GV330_Lecture10_Image_Video_Audio_Data.pdf)
- [Seminar Repo](https://github.com/GV330/seminar9_audiovisual)
